subject: Delivery issue with my order
summary:
Body:
Hello Team,
I ordered a laptop on 2nd April (Order ID: 78452), but I have not received it yet. The delivery was promised within 3 days. This delay is causing serious problems as I need it for my college submission. Please resolve this urgently or initiate a refund. Regards,
Anitha

subject: Interview Schedule for Data Analyst Role
summary:
Body:
Hi Candidate,
We are pleased to inform you that you have been shortlisted for the Data Analyst position. Your interview is scheduled on 12th April at 10:00 AM via Zoom. Please confirm your availability. Best regards,
HR Team
